languages.text: {n}Через мгновение {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} делает судорожный вдох и приходит в себя, вздрагивая.{/n} "Двадцать процентов: гипертензия, кратковременная потеря сознания. Движущая Сила беснуется, необходимы дополнительные порто-кавальные шунты для того, чтобы ее умилостивить и компенсировать избыточное давление, так-так... Ты был прав, Нунциус. Извлечение абдомена невозможно — это неопровержимый факт".

traits.locale_text: {n}Через мгновение {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} делает судорожный вдох и приходит в себя, вздрагивая.{/n} "Двадцать процентов: гипертензия, кратковременная потеря сознания. Напряжение избыточно, необходимы дополнительные порто-кавальные шунты для компенсации избыточного давления, так-так... Ну конечно! Ты был прав, Нунциус. Извлечение абдомена невозможно". {n}Он делает несколько пометок в инфопластине. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}Сервочереп{/g}, жужжа, зависает над головой Эо-ганна.{/n}
traits.speaker: EogannCompanion

languages.text: {n}A moment passes, and the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} draws a shuddering breath and startles back to consciousness.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, momentary loss of consciousness. The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."
languages.original_text: {n}Через мгновение {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}генетор{/g} делает судорожный вдох и приходит в себя, вздрагивая.{/n} "Двадцать процентов: гипертензия, кратковременная потеря сознания. Движущая Сила беснуется, необходимы дополнительные порто-кавальные шунты для того, чтобы ее умилостивить и компенсировать избыточное давление, так-так... Ты был прав, Нунциус. Извлечение абдомена невозможно — это неопровержимый факт".

Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

languages.text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Moment holt der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} bebend Luft und kommt wieder zu Bewusstsein.{/n} "Zwanzig Prozent: Hypertonie, kurzzeitiger Bewusstseinsverlust. Die Antriebskraft schwillt unkontrollierbar an, zusätzliche portokavale Widerstände zur Besänftigung und Kompensation des überschüssigen Drucks erforderlich ... Nun denn. Ihr hattet recht, Nuncius. Abdominale Extraktion ist unmöglich ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."
languages.original_text: {n}A moment passes, and the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} draws a shuddering breath and startles back to consciousness.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, momentary loss of consciousness. The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einem kurzen Moment holt der {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} bebend Luft und kommt wieder zu Bewusstsein.{/n} "Zwanzig Prozent: Hypertonie, kurzzeitiger Bewusstseinsverlust. Die Antriebskraft schwillt unkontrollierbar an, zusätzliche portokavale Widerstände zur Besänftigung und Kompensation des überschüssigen Drucks erforderlich ... Nun denn. Ihr hattet recht, Nuncius. Abdominale Extraktion ist unmöglich ... das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache."

languages.text: {n}Un instant plus tard, le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} prend une inspiration tremblante et reprend brusquement connaissance.{/n} « Vingt pour cent : hypertension, perte momentanée de conscience. La Force Motrice a une surtension incontrôlable. Des dérivations porto-caves sont nécessaires pour l'apaiser et contrebalancer la tension excessive... Très bien. Tu avais raison, Nuncius. L'extraction abdominale est impossible. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »
languages.original_text: {n}A moment passes, and the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} draws a shuddering breath and startles back to consciousness.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, momentary loss of consciousness. The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un instant plus tard, le {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} prend une inspiration tremblante et reprend brusquement connaissance.{/n} « Vingt pour cent : hypertension, perte momentanée de conscience. La Force Motrice a une surtension incontrôlable. Des dérivations porto-caves sont nécessaires pour l'apaiser et contrebalancer la tension excessive... Très bien. Tu avais raison, Nuncius. L'extraction abdominale est impossible. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. »

languages.text: {n}片刻之后，这位{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}猛然吸气，从恍惚中惊醒。{/n}“百分之二十：高血压，短暂意识丧失。源力失控涌动，需要额外的门腔分流术以安抚和平衡过剩的压力……很好。你是对的，努恩修斯——腹腔摘除不可行。这一点毋庸置疑。”
languages.original_text: {n}A moment passes, and the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} draws a shuddering breath and startles back to consciousness.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, momentary loss of consciousness. The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}片刻之后，这位{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}基因士{/g}猛然吸气，从恍惚中惊醒。{/n}“百分之二十：高血压，短暂意识丧失。源力失控涌动，需要额外的门腔分流术以安抚和平衡过剩的压力……很好。你是对的，努恩修斯——腹腔摘除不可行。这一点毋庸置疑。”

languages.text: {n}Al cabo de un momento, el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} respira bruscamente y recupera el conocimiento.{/n} «Veinte por ciento: hipertensión, pérdida momentánea del conocimiento. La Fuerza Motriz está descontrolada, se necesitan derivaciones portocavales adicionales para propiciarla y compensar el exceso de presión... De acuerdo. Tenía razón usted, Nuncius. La extracción del abdomen es imposible... es un hecho irrefutable».
languages.original_text: {n}A moment passes, and the {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetor{/g} draws a shuddering breath and startles back to consciousness.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, momentary loss of consciousness. The Motive Force is surging uncontrollably, additional portocaval shunts are required to propitiate it and compensate for the excess pressure... Well, then. You were right, Nuncius. Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

traits.locale_text: {n}Al cabo de un momento, el {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}genetor{/g} respira bruscamente y recupera el conocimiento.{/n} «Veinte por ciento: hipertensión, pérdida momentánea del conocimiento. La Fuerza Motriz está descontrolada, se necesitan derivaciones portocavales adicionales para propiciarla y compensar el exceso de presión... De acuerdo. Tenía razón usted, Nuncius. La extracción del abdomen es imposible... es un hecho irrefutable».

languages.text: {n}しばらくして{g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}発電機{/g} 、痙攣するような呼吸をし、震えながら我に返った。{/n}「20％：高血圧、一過性の意識消失。緊張が過剰で、過剰な圧力を補うために大静脈シャントの追加が必要です。もちろんだ！君の言う通りだ、ヌンジウス。腹部からの回収は不可能です」。{n}彼はインフォプレートにメモを取る。{g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}サーボスカル{/g} 、渦を巻きながらエオガンヌの頭上をホバリングする。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a moment {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}generator{/g} takes a convulsive breath and comes to, shuddering.{/n} "Twenty percent: hypertension, transient loss of consciousness. Tension is excessive, need additional porto-caval shunts to compensate for excessive pressure, well, well.... Of course! You were right, Nunzius. Abdominal retrieval is impossible." {n}He makes a few notes on the infoplate. {g|Encyclopedia:ServoSkulls}The servo-skull{/g}, whirring, hovers over Eoghanne's head.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Bir an sonra {g|Encyclopedia:Genetor}Genetör{/g}, titreyerek nefes alıyor ve irkilerek bilincini geri kazanıyor.{/n} "Yüzde yirmi: Hipertansiyon, anlık bilinç kaybı. Devinim Gücü, kontrolsüz bir şekilde dalgalanıyor. Onu teskin etmek ve aşırı basıncı telafi etmek için ek portokaval şantlar gerekiyor... Pekâlâ. Haklıydın Nuncius. Karın ekstraksiyonu imkânsız. Bu tartışılmaz bir gerçek."

Abdominal extraction is impossible — this is an incontrovertible fact."

Devinim Gücü, kontrolsüz bir şekilde dalgalanıyor. Onu teskin etmek ve aşırı basıncı telafi etmek için ek portokaval şantlar gerekiyor... Pekâlâ. Haklıydın Nuncius. Karın ekstraksiyonu imkânsız.
